parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT i.user_id FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.detected_at >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND i.detected_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND (i.meta->>'status') = 'classified';

SELECT i.indicator_type, i.company_name, i.reason, i.sentiment_score, i.source_platform, i.detected_at FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND i.detected_at >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND i.detected_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND (i.meta->>'status') = 'classified' ORDER BY i.detected_at DESC;

SELECT p.pattern_type, p.company_name, p.description, p.frequency, p.trend, p.confidence FROM winloss.patterns p WHERE p.user_id = '{{ $('Get Users With Data').item.json.user_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY p.frequency DESC;

INSERT INTO winloss.reports (user_id, report_month, title, content_json, content_md, indicator_count, pattern_count, companies_analyzed) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.report_month }}'::date, '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.content_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.indicator_count }}, {{ $json.pattern_count }}, ARRAY[{{ $json.companies_analyzed.map(c => "'" + c.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]) ON CONFLICT (user_id, report_month) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, indicator_count = EXCLUDED.indicator_count, pattern_count = EXCLUDED.pattern_count, companies_analyzed = EXCLUDED.companies_analyzed;
